steps.text: Wire three resistors (220Ω, 330Ω, 470Ω) in series with a 12V supply.
An ammeter in series reads the single loop current.
The same current flows through every resistor. Move the voltmeter to read each drop.
In series, current is constant and voltages add: V = V1+V2+V3. Total R = R1+R2+R3.
